lesson: A top block of mass m1 = 3.2 kg rests on a bottom block that is on a frictionless horizontal table. A horizontal force F = 26 N pushes the bottom block. If the coefficient of static friction between the two blocks is mu_s = 0.45, determine the minimum mass m2 of the lower block so that the blocks move together without slipping. Take g = 9.8 m/s^2.
